raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased my ticket directly from XXXX, even though the flight was operated by their partner, XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX cancelled my flight, and I did not take the flight. At the airport, XXXX XXXX boarding agent did not allow me to board because I was told I had not paid a pet fee. However, I did not have a pet with me. Despite my explanation, I was denied boarding. I refused to leave the gate area because I believed the situation was a misunderstanding. As a result, the XXXX XXXX agent called the police. The police arrived, instructed me to leave, and explained that I could not take the flight because the XXXX agent had already cancelled it. Since the flight was canceled and I did not travel, I am requesting that XXXX issue my refund immediately. 

If I do not receive my refund, I will submit a formal complaint to the XXXX. I was treated unfairly and discriminatory, as I was asked where Im from originally ( Im originally from XXXX ) and was chargedor expected to payfor a pet fee when I was not traveling with a pet. 

XXXX confirmation code : XXXX. XXXX XXXX confirmation code : XXXX.
